pages.title: Level 0
pages.text_zone: Welcome to §eLevel 0§r, the beginning of your adventure! This level is a vast office made of yellow walls, and lit by a series of old flickering lamps. Beware, entities lurk here.

pages.title: Level 0 - First Steps
pages.text_zone: You can try to find an exit, but it’s going to be difficult... You’ll have to locate certain structures. First, find the abandoned lab with a rover. Destroy it (§aIron Pickaxe§r) to obtain a §dHard Drive§r.

pages.title: Level 0 - Detectors !
pages.text_zone: With §a1 Copper Ingot§r, §a1 Gold Ingot§r and §a3 Iron Ingots§r, you can craft yourself a detector! By itself, it does nothing, but combined with a §dHard Drive§r, it might help you find something.

pages.title: Level 0 - Lab. Detector
pages.text_zone: This detector now displays coordinates leading you to the nearest experiment laboratory near you.

pages.title: Level 0 - Experiment Lab
pages.text_zone: Abandoned? Again? In some barrels you should find a §dBattery§r. But it’s empty, to recharge it you can right click on the §dCharger Block§r in the lab. As you charge it, some entities might try to stop you…

pages.title: Level 0 - Experiment Lab (2)
pages.text_zone: With your charged §dBattery§r, you can now power the big robot inside the quilted room. Once awakened, it will attack you, kill it to obtain a §dHigh §dCapacity §dHard §dDrive§r.

pages.title: Level 0 - Portal Detector
pages.text_zone: We can finally upgrade our old §dLaboratory Detector§r! Combining a §dHigh §dCapacity §dHard §dDrive§r with either a §dDetector§r or a §dLaboratory §dDetector§r will give you a §dPortal §dDetector§r. Follow its coordinates.

pages.title: Level 0 - Portal Lab
pages.text_zone: The lab is guarded by a blind robot. Avoid it by walking and not running or jumping. To escape, jump onto the yellow and black taped floor in the center.
